name: Commercial Credit Group Inc
description_short: Commercial Credit Group finances heavy equipment for construction, manufacturing, transportation, and waste industries with flexible terms and industry expertise.
description_long:
Commercial Credit Group Inc is a specialized equipment financing lender serving small to mid-sized businesses in equipment-intensive industries. The company focuses on providing capital solutions for companies that need to acquire, refinance, or lease heavy machinery and equipment across construction, manufacturing, transportation, and waste management sectors.

CCG offers a comprehensive suite of equipment financing products including new and used equipment financing, equipment refinancing, equipment leasing, working capital loans, equipment debt consolidation, and accounts receivable financing. They also provide a CCG Fuel Card as a value-added service and have a dealer partnership program. The company operates multiple locations and maintains a customer success program highlighting completed projects and client achievements across their target industries.

The company distinguishes itself through industry-specific expertise and a stated philosophy of combining technology with traditional fundamentals. They provide educational resources including a Finance Insights Blog, whitepapers, guides, checklists, and financial calculators (Equipment Financing and Section 179 Tax Savings calculators). Their marketing emphasizes flexible terms tailored to individual business cash flows and timelines rather than one-size-fits-all products.

As a business lender, CCG operates in a competitive market with numerous equipment financing alternatives. The website does not disclose interest rate ranges, approval requirements, minimum loan amounts, or typical processing timelines. Credit approval criteria and suitability for businesses with poor credit history or limited cash flow are not addressed. The company requires applicants to contact them directly for specific terms, making comparison shopping difficult.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specializes in heavy equipment financing across multiple industries (construction, manufacturing, transportation, waste)
Offers both equipment financing and capital solutions (working capital loans, accounts receivable financing, debt consolidation)
Provides free educational resources including industry-specific guides, whitepapers, and financial calculators
Multiple service options including new/used equipment, refinancing, and equipment leasing flexibility
Industry expertise demonstrated through customer success stories and case studies by sector
Toll-free customer service line (1-855-893-0700) and online application portal
Dealer partnership program available for equipment dealers
cons: No interest rates, APR ranges, or fee structures disclosed on website
Minimum loan amounts and credit score requirements not specified
No clear timeline for loan approval or funding provided
Limited transparency on approval criteria or suitability for businesses with poor credit/tax liens (though one case study mentions they helped a contractor with bankruptcy history, specifics unclear)
Requires phone call or application to get pricing information, hindering comparison shopping
best_for: Construction companies needing heavy equipment financing or refinancing
Transportation and trucking businesses acquiring or upgrading commercial vehicles
Manufacturing and fabrication companies requiring capital equipment
Established businesses with equipment-based operations seeking flexible financing alternatives to traditional bank loans
diagnosis: Commercial Credit Group is best for established small-to-mid-sized businesses in equipment-intensive industries (construction, manufacturing, transportation, waste) that need to finance heavy equipment purchases and have sufficient operational history. Primary caveat: the company does not publicly disclose interest rates, fees, credit requirements, or approval timelines—all pricing is quote-based and requires direct contact, making it difficult to assess affordability or eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 525 N Tryon St Suite 1000, Charlotte, NC 28202
meta_description: Commercial Credit Group finances heavy equipment for construction, manufacturing, transportation, and waste industries.
